changelog:
TACTICAL OPERATOR V5.0:
- [CORE] SQLite WAL Mode: Centralized database connection (db_connect.php) for high concurrency and zero database-locking.
- [BUG FIX] Resolved Bunker Mode toggle duplication in system configuration.
- [BUG FIX] Fixed Public Hologram radar to correctly display local commander transmissions.
- [REFACTOR] Codebase standardization and English translation of core operations.
